articles.title: $0.001 SHIB Price Looks Nigh As Shiba Inu’s Testnet Sees Rising Activity Ahead of Shibarium Mainnet
articles.description: Shiba Inu, the renowned meme-based cryptocurrency, experienced an astounding 1800% surge in its burn rate within a mere 24-hour period.

articles.title: Nasdaq refiles for BlackRock spot bitcoin ETF, names Coinbase as surveillance partner
articles.description: Nasdaq refiled a 19b-4 filing for the iShares Bitcoin Trust, a spot bitcoin ETF with BlackRock at the helm.

articles.title: BREAKING: BlackRock Has Re-applied Spot Bitcoin ETF After Its Arrangement!
articles.description: BlackRock, the world's largest asset management company, has applied for a Bitcoin ETF again after the SEC's warning. Continue Reading: BREAKING: BlackRock Has Re-applied Spot Bitcoin ETF After Its Arrangement!

articles.title: Revolut to delist Polygon, Solana and Cardano
articles.description: Revolut is taking the step after its US-based partner Bakkt recently delisted the tokens. MATIC, ADA and SOL will however still be available on Revolut across other markets. Robinhood and eToro have recently also announced similar token delistings. Revolut will end support for three major cryptocurrencies, the crypto-friendly bank has told its customers in the […]

articles.title: Revolut delists ADA, MATIC, SOL
articles.description: The SEC has claimed that SOL, MATIC and ADA are securities

articles.title: Is it Too Late to Buy Bitcoin Cash? BCH Price Pumps Up 50% While AI Crypto Signals Platform yPredict Raises $2.7 Million
articles.description: Bitcoin Cash (BCH) is holding close to the $300 level after an intense melt-up in the last few weeks. BCH/USD was last changing hands around $291, down a little on the day amid a subdued tone to broader cryptocurrency market trade. Despite now trading around 10% lower versus last Friday’s more than one-year peaks around $330, BCH is still up more than 200% versus earlier monthly lows...

articles.title: Revolut is delisting Polygon, Solana and Cardano tokens in the US
articles.description: Crypto-friendly neobank Revolut is delisting Polygon (MATIC), Solana (SOL) and Cardano (ADA) tokens in the U.S. in September.

articles.title: Ripple Unlocks One Billion XRP From Escrow, Here's Impact on Price

articles.title: Attacker pockets $10 million from Poly Network security attack: Beosin
articles.description: The Poly Network attacker illicitly minted varying amounts of 57 tokens across 10 blockchains, including Ethereum, BNB Chain and Metis.
